name: Debouncer
description: A switch debouncer that implements a simple switch debouncer to allow simple passive guitar footswitches to be attached to the module's inputs and used with algorithms like the Looper algorithm.
gui_description: A switch debouncer interface with per-channel settings for input/output routing, voltage output, and debounce timing.

parameters.name: Time
parameters.description: The hold-off time. Once the output has changed, it is not allowed to change again for the this duration.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: Output Volts
parameters.description: The output voltage when the input is 'high', in Volts.

parameters.name: Output semitones
parameters.description: The output voltage when the input is 'high', in 12-TET semitones (one twelfth of a Volt).

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to 'None', the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always 'Replace'.
